task_name: Add REST API Client Generator to Prisma

plan_metrics.plan_content:
Here's a summary of the plan I've put together after exploring the codebase:

---

## Plan: `packages/generator-rest-client/`

### How Prisma generators work (what I found)

Generators use an **external-process JSON-RPC protocol**. Prisma spawns a process matching the `provider` string, sends two RPC calls over stdin/stderr:
- `getManifest` → returns metadata (`prettyName`, `defaultOutput`, etc.)
- `generate` → receives the full `GeneratorOptions` (including `options.dmmf`) and produces files

The `generatorHandler` function from `@prisma/generator-helper` handles all the JSON-RPC plumbing — you just pass it `{ onManifest, onGenerate }` callbacks.

---

### Files to create (7 total)

| File | What it does |
|---|---|
| `package.json` | Name `@prisma/generator-rest-client`, `bin: { "prisma-generator-rest-client": "dist/index.js" }`, depends on `@prisma/generator-helper` + `@prisma/dmmf` |
| `tsconfig.json` | Identical to all other packages (`extends ../../tsconfig.json`) |
| `tsconfig.build.json` | Identical to all other packages |
| `helpers/build.ts` | Identical two-liner: `void build(adapterConfig)` |
| `src/index.ts` | Calls `generatorHandler({ onManifest, onGenerate })` — the bin entry point |
| `src/generator.ts` | Resolves output dir from `options.generator.output`, calls template helpers, writes `rest-client.ts` |
| `src/template.ts` | Pure functions: maps DMMF field types → TS types, generates model interfaces + CRUD method signatures |

### Generated output shape (for a `User` model)

```typescript
// Auto-generated by @prisma/generator-rest-client. Do not edit manually.

export interface User {
  id: number
  email: string
  name: string | null
}

export interface UserRestClient {
  findMany(params?: { skip?: number; take?: number; where?: Partial<User> }): Promise<User[]>
  findUnique(params: { where: { id: number } }): Promise<User | null>
  create(params: { data: Omit<User, 'id'> }): Promise<User>
  update(params: { where: { id: number }; data: Partial<User> }): Promise<User>
  delete(params: { where: { id: number } }): Promise<User>
}

export interface RestClient {
  user: UserRestClient
}
```

### Verification
- `pnpm --filter @prisma/generator-rest-client build` should emit `dist/index.js`, `dist/index.mjs`, `dist/index.d.ts`
- Manual integration test: point a `test.prisma` at `dist/index.js` via `provider = "node ./packages/generator-rest-client/dist/index.js"` and run `prisma generate`
